title: Fragments#43-44
collaboration: Multi-media performance by Gauthier Keyaerts in collaboration with François Zajega
description:
Software development in MaxMSP
	                        / 25 channels audio player outputting a sound spatialization onto up to 8 speakers
	                        / A Kinect gathers the performer's position on stage and his gestures.
	                        / The position mapped onto a 5x5 grid is used to assign the gesture commands to audio effects and filters on the corresponding channels
	                        / A gesture also controls loading the next scene with to the next set of 25 soundfiles
